name: Stuffed Mushroom Caps
recipeIngredient: 1 slice Whole wheat bread, made into crumbs in blender
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Gently clean the mushrooms with a damp cloth. Remove the stems and chop them finely.
2. Heat the oil (or water) in a skillet. Add the onion and cook until golden. Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute. Add the chopped mushroom stems, basil, oregano, and parsley, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the bread crumbs, pepper, soy sauce, and sherry, and stir until heated through for 2 minutes. Adjust seasoning with additional salt and pepper if needed.
3. Place the mushroom caps, open side up, in a lightly oiled baking dish. Fill each cap with the bread crumb mixture, forming a mound with your fingers.
4. Bake for 15 minutes and serve hot.
